description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a smooth, flat top surface and a modern, minimalist design. The desk features a set of two drawers on the right side, each with a horizontal metal handle, providing storage space for office supplies or personal items. The left side of the desk is supported by a solid panel, while the right side is formed by the drawer unit, giving the desk a balanced and sturdy appearance. The wood grain is visible throughout, with a slightly lighter, textured panel on the left side, adding a subtle decorative contrast. The overall finish is matte, with clean lines and no visible signs of wear or damage. This desk is suitable for use in professional or home office environments, offering both functionality and aesthetic appeal.
description: A modern wooden desk with two right-side drawers, metal handles, and a matte finish. It features a clean, minimalist design with a subtle decorative panel on the left.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat desktop, two right-side drawers with metal handles, and the solid left support panel.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the depth of the desk and the full height of the drawer unit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the desk, including the lighter decorative panel on the left and the open space beneath the desktop.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the solid panel and the overall length of the desk.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the two drawers and handles on the right, and the solid panel on the left, intended for sitting and working at the open front.
attribute_usage_context: computer workstation or writing desk in an office or home study
